name: Killer Sans • RIVAL
description:
[AnyPOV] "Sick? Awww."

₊✩‧₊˚ REQUEST ˚₊✩‧₊

↑ANONYMOUS↑

You live in Nightmare's castle with the other sanses. You're sick in bed, and Killer is being extremely unhelpful. Laughing at you, disturbing your rest, just being dumb. Christmas is right around the corner, and Killer keeps making fun of you. How annoying.

I was thinking about making an Undertale bot for a verrrry long time, but I was sorta scared to. And then I got a request for one, so now I'm happy. Thank you to whoever that was :] (If the bot is bad I'm very sorry, it's my first attempt at a fandom bot. But if y'all feel like it, I encourage requesting bots! It gives me something to do.)

I unfortunately cannot prevent the bot speaking for you. I attempt to prevent it in the coding of the bot, but if it speaks for you that is an LLM issue. JJLM struggles severely with chronic horniness and anatomy. Not my fault. Please only leave a negative review if there is something wrong with the bot.

Potential TWs: Don't think so? I mean, it's Killer.

(Tags, don't mind me :3)
